scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n FRONTEND,BACKEND,SERVICES -c cyan,green,magenta "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "python -m uvicorn api.service_api:app --app-dir services --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install
